start_connection_screen.initiate: If you want to initiate a connection
start_connection_screen.connect: If you want to connect to already created peer

copy_code_screen.your_code: This is your two-word pair cod. Copy and send it to your friend
copy_code_screen.wait: Wait your friend to paste the code for button enabling

paste_code_screen.paste_code: Copy your friend’s code and paste it to the text input below:

connection_screen.warn_termination: This leads to the termination of your connection
connection_screen.return_to_prev_step: Return to the previous step and try to pair once again
connection_screen.device_to _accept: Waiting your friend’s device to accept...
connection_screen.device_to_answer: Waiting your friend’s device to answer...
